sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13211" key="a)pomh/khs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπομήκης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, prob. <sense id="n13211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπι-</ref></xr>, Sophon. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in de An.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
